dependencies.name: RabbitMQ Message Broker
dependencies.function: ALL inter-service coordination. Every service depends on this broker for message exchange. Failure disconnects all services from each other.
dependencies.failure_mode: SILENCE — services continue running independently but coordination stops

dependencies.name: MongoDB Database
dependencies.function: ALL persistent state — actions, executions, triggers, rules, datastore. Every service stores and retrieves state through MongoDB.
dependencies.failure_mode: ERROR — services will throw connection errors

dependencies.name: Coordination Backend
dependencies.function: Distributed coordination and leader election for multi-node deployments
dependencies.failure_mode: DEGRADED — affects multi-node coordination, single-node may continue

external_target_types.description: Sensors connect to external monitoring systems, APIs, file systems, webhooks
Actions execute on remote targets via SSH, REST, cloud APIs
